[CONCLUSION ]
	With the rapid development and expansion of AI tools and content, it’s often easy to forget how far we’ve come with AI development. AI isn’t just a tool or the crappy content that you see in your social media feeds, it’s a dynamic, interdisciplinary field that has expanded, recontextualized, and developed itself over the years. It’s a field that has made powerful contributions to math, psychology, social sciences, biology, and many other fields. It’s a field that questioned our philosophical understandings on intelligence, of sentience, and of the human psyche as a whole. What originally was simply a rather silly, abstract thought experiment of the time turned into a fully fledged industry powered by beautiful, well-designed mathematical architecture and highly advanced physical technologies. Next time you go on ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, or any other AI interface; I want you to take a second to think of the hidden mechanisms that made it possible so that you can type something like “How’s your day?” and receive a reply like “It was great! How was your’s, user?” It’s really a beautiful thing.
